filter_reason: Benchmark-integrity analysis from a major lab - directly moves the picture on how coding evals should be read.
summary: OpenAI published an analysis identifying reliability problems in SWE-Bench Pro, a widely cited benchmark for AI coding ability. The findings raise questions about how much weight recent coding-benchmark comparisons should carry across models. If you use SWE-Bench Pro numbers to compare frontier models' coding skills, this changes how skeptically you should read them.
title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
excerpt: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
